name: Okura Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Okura Industrial Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells polyethylene and polypropylene products in Japan. It offers automotive films, drum can interior films, adhesives for metal parts, tray food films, livestock packaging films, shrink films for food packaging, liquid filling films, laminated films for food, commercial transport films, wrapping films, mail order films, logistics films, liquid transport films, functional garbage bags, flexographic printing related films, laminate-related films, environmentally friendly products, base films for packaging, phase difference films/polarizing plate protection films, self-adhesive protective films, optical films, OA equipment parts, and parts adhesives. The company also provides curing films, architectural films, films for laminating steel plates, films for integrated packaging, particle boards, soil insulation films, soil temperature rise suppression films, pest repellent films, color scheme films, antibacterial agricultural films, biodegradable films, stretch films for grass, house films, liquid fertilizer filling films, environment friendly films, films of tunnels, and sanitary materials and daily necessities films. It serves automobile, food, medical/pharmaceutical, general packaging, optics/information electronics, architecture, agriculture, and livingware industries. The company was formerly known as Shikoku Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Okura Industrial Co., Ltd. in November 1955. Okura Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Marugame, Japan.
